items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟Medium🆕Nappa Squeeze Handbag👜An exquisite and soft new handbag made of soft-touch Nappa leather. This handbag is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight wrinkled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft-touch handle. This medium version is made of Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.

This small size is crafted from Nappa sheep leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, plus an extra chain to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure* Internal zip pocket *Unlined* loewe hot stamping or silver stamping.

size:29*10.5*24CM

items.name_en: 👄Flamenco series upgraded lucky bag is in stock💥 Made of premium soft calfskin
items.name_cn:
👄Flamenco series upgraded lucky bag is in stock💥 Made of premium soft calfskin
Corded drawstring creates a lucky bag shape: simple yet unique, magnetic closure, very spacious, shoulder or crossbody, clutch okay, casual yet classy feel, simply a style booster~Small Size:23.9*18*9cm

items.name_en: 🔥New Paseo Chain Style Small Dumpling Bag🔥 Imported Nappa leather creates a lazy yet high-class vibe💥 Exquisite craftsmanship, simple and elegant silhouette🌹 Beauty and utility combined, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is also great🌷 Suitable for French elegance, modern style, and sweet cool style alike. The handle goes through the body, bringing a unique soft and ultra-light pleated structure💄 "Paseo" is the new form of the L0💋ewe dumpling bag! This bag, which appears most often on the runway, is named "Paseo" 👜 Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful style💄 The bag features a streamlined look, shaped like a dumpling⭐️ The handle is a drawstring design, with knotted buckle elements on both sides continuing the Flamenco series, top zipper closure, and reinforced with circular stitching at the bottom🌞 Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and soft🎁 Size: 35~21~11.5CM
